evals.prompt: Given a .nsys-rep, list the analysis commands and expected tables.
evals.expected_output: Explains export to SQLite and queries tables/NVTX data with correct schema handling.
assertions: Mentions CUDA kernel tables may be empty for Kit/RTX traces

evals.prompt: My Nsight SQLite has NVTX_EVENTS but no CUDA kernel rows. Is that a failure?
evals.expected_output: Explains when empty CUDA kernel tables are expected and what capture flags/workload types would produce CUDA rows.
assertions: States Kit/RTX Vulkan traces may have empty CUDA kernel tables
Suggests checking -t cuda only when CUDA/Warp/PyTorch work is expected
